title: Dubai announces Eid Al Fitr 2026 holiday for public sector employees; four-day break confirmed
summary_full: Dubai has announced a four-day Eid Al Fitr holiday for public sector employees from March 19 to March 22, 2026. Private sector workers will also enjoy a holiday, potentially extending to March 22.  March salaries will be paid early on March 17 to aid preparations. Residents can plan staycations, explore local festivities, or take short international trips.
